reasoning_model_1: Model 1 generates the audio with perfect content accuracy; every word matches the script '太好了！我考试通过了...' without errors. model_comparison: Both models deliver the correct text with good fluency. The deciding factor is the adherence to the specific feature control command 'Use High Pitch' (用高音).
